name: Man in Charge
overview: Set during the Qing Dynasty of China in the mid 18th century, the drama tells the story of a stubborn official adviser, Chau Bing, and his relationship with the young county official, Shum Kwan-Pok. Bing obtains a secure job as Kwan-Pok's private adviser and the two become good friends. They both try to root out corruption within the Manchu government.

trailers.title: TVB 幕後大老爺 宣傳片 金牌幕僚，最怕老婆  (TVB Channel)
